description: A customer files for bankruptcy. The finance department must file a claim for any outstanding debt.

nodes.task_description: Receive notification of the customer's bankruptcy filing.
Compile a list of all outstanding invoices for the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a report of all money owed.

nodes.task_description: File a proof of claim with the bankruptcy court for the outstanding amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully files the legal claim.
